title: Process Large CSV Files in Chunks with pandas
summary: Read large CSV files in pandas chunks and process each chunk without loading the full dataset into memory.
highlights: Uses pandas read_csv with an explicit chunk size
Returns processed results in chunk order
Supports read_csv passthrough options like usecols and dtype
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9 on macOS after installing pandas. Verified behavior includes chunk order preservation, read_csv option passthrough, header-only CSV handling, and chunk processor error propagation.
